name: openEuler Packaging SIG
description: The openEuler package management team is the software package management organization under the openEuler technical committee. It maintains the software package packaging specifications of the openEuler community, maintains public software packages, and coordinates and decides on package dependency issues during version release in the openEuler community.

name: openEuler Packaging SIG 代码仓库列表
description: openEuler Packaging SIG 维护的 4 个代码仓库，涵盖 基础设施与工具 领域

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG（Special Interest Group，特别兴趣小组）负责 The openEuler package management team is the software package management organization under the openEuler technical committee. It maintains the software package packaging specifications of the openEuler community, maintains public software packages, and coordinates and decides on package dependency issues during version release in the openEuler community.。该 SIG 共有 9 名核心成员，维护 4 个代码仓库，属于 基础设施与工具 领域。

mainEntity.name: 如何参与 openEuler Packaging SIG？

acceptedAnswer.text: 参与 openEuler Packaging SIG 的方式：1）向相关仓库（如 src-openeuler/rpmdevtools、src-openeuler/multilib-rpm-config、src-openeuler/pakchois）提交 Pull Request；2）订阅邮件列表 dev@openeuler.org；3）参加 SIG 定期工作会议，会议信息见 openEuler 官网活动日历。

mainEntity.name: openEuler Packaging SIG 包含哪些代码仓库？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG 共维护 4 个代码仓库，主要包括：src-openeuler/rpmdevtools、src-openeuler/multilib-rpm-config、src-openeuler/pakchois 等。完整列表见 https://www.openeuler.org/zh/sig/Packaging。

mainEntity.name: openEuler Packaging SIG 的 Maintainer 是谁？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Packaging SIG 现有 7 名 Maintainer，包括：xiaowen He、cihua Li、feng Hu。Maintainer 负责代码最终审核与合并。
